'''Katraasii''' was a spaceport city, located on the [[Katraasii|planet of the same name]].

During the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era, it was controlled by the [[Imperial Remnant]], and was frequented by criminals like [[Abron Mar]]. [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] went there to look for Mar while seeking [[Takara]], but fell into a trap.

It was known to have some minor [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] activity, and also contained no fewer than three [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' {{1st}}
